services.h1: Web design agency services, built to an award-winning standard
services.intro: We build custom, individually engineered websites — built by AI agents, technically clean, fast, and optimised for visibility.

items.title: Custom design & development
items.body: Every website is designed from scratch and built in clean code. No theme, no page builder — a presence that fits your brand exactly.

items.title: Cinematic motion design
items.body: Scroll-driven, immersive, award-level animation — built with GSAP. Motion that guides and delights without sacrificing performance. prefers-reduced-motion is honoured.

items.title: Performance, SEO & GAIO
items.body: Fast load times, clean Schema.org markup, and structures that both Google and AI answer engines understand. Lighthouse targets: ≥ 95 desktop, ≥ 85 mobile, SEO 100.

items.title: Bilingual & built by AI agents
items.body: DE/EN from the start — with a language switcher and correct hreflang. Built by a team of AI agents: faster to build, consistent in quality, hosted and shipped via Vercel.

services.techStrip: Next.js / React · GSAP motion · Schema.org · DE/EN (hreflang) · Hosting via Vercel · 48h reply

process.intro: A clear path from first idea to going live — built by AI agents, transparent at every step.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.body: We understand your brand, your goal and your reference sites. That defines a clear direction.

steps.title: Design & concept
steps.body: We design the custom presence — layout, typography, motion concept. You approve the concept.

steps.title: Development
steps.body: AI agents build the website in clean code, with animation, SEO and bilingual support.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We test on every device, optimise performance and go live — hosted via Vercel.

faq.intro: Answers on process, technology, languages and AI-built development at HM Websites.

items.a: HM Websites builds custom, individually engineered websites with cinematic motion design. The websites are built by AI agents and delivered to an award-winning standard.

items.q: Are the websites really built by AI agents?
items.a: Yes. A team of specialised AI agents handles design, development, SEO and quality assurance. That makes the build faster and keeps quality consistently high.

items.q: Do you use templates or page builders?
items.a: No. Every website is designed from scratch and built in clean code.
We build with Next.js and React, animate with GSAP, and host via Vercel.
Yes. We deliver websites in German and English by default, with a language switcher and correct hreflang.

items.q: How fast and visible are the websites?
items.a: We optimise for Lighthouse scores of ≥ 95 desktop and ≥ 85 mobile, SEO 100, including Schema.org and GAIO structure for AI answer engines.

items.q: How do I start a project?
items.a: Send us a short description of your project through the contact form. You'll get a reply within 48 hours.

contact.intro: Tell us about your plans. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thanks! Your request arrived — we'll reply within 48 hours.

impressum.content:
**Information pursuant to § 5 TMG**

HM Websites
Henry Mirus
Pantaleonstr. 20
53567 Buchholz
Germany

**Contact**
Phone: +49 015750126303
Email: mrs.hrny@gmail.com

**Responsible for content per § 55(2) RStV:**
Henry Mirus, address as above.

**Liability for content**
The contents of our pages have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content.

**Liability for links**
Our offering contains links to external third-party websites, over whose content we have no influence and for which we can assume no liability.

**Copyright**
The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author.

**Dispute Resolution**
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr
Our email address can be found above in the imprint. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.title: 1. Controller
sections.body: HM Websites, Henry Mirus, Pantaleonstr. 20, 53567 Buchholz, Email: mrs.hrny@gmail.com

sections.title: 2. Collection and storage of personal data
sections.body: We collect personal data only to the extent necessary to provide our services. Processing is based on Art. 6(1) GDPR.

sections.title: 3. Contact form
sections.body: When you contact us via the contact form, your details (name, email, message) are stored with our hosting provider Supabase (EU servers) and used solely to process your enquiry.

sections.title: 4. Hosting
sections.body: This website is hosted via Vercel, Inc. (340 Pine Street, Suite 701, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA). Vercel processes connection data (IP address, browser, timestamp) on servers in the EU (Frankfurt/Amsterdam) pursuant to Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Vercel is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. Further information is available in Vercel's privacy policy at vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy.

sections.title: 5. Web analytics (GA4, anonymised)
sections.body: We use Google Analytics 4 with IP anonymisation. GA4 is only loaded after your consent via the cookie banner. You can withdraw your consent at any time.

sections.title: 6. Cookies & consent
sections.body: We set essential cookies for site operation. Statistics cookies are only set with your consent. You can change your settings at any time.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. Contact: mrs.hrny@gmail.com

sections.title: 8. Data protection contact
sections.body: For data protection enquiries please contact: mrs.hrny@gmail.com
